text: in an empty column page, entering aim edit mode and adding aims should not be possible

status.comment: Implemented guard in aim navigation: create shortcuts o/O now require a selected aim context, preventing create modal opening on empty-column pages. Added focused regression test in packages/frontend/src/__tests__/ui-teleport.spec.ts (does not open create modal when no aim selected). Verification: npm run test:unit -w frontend -- src/__tests__/ui-teleport.spec.ts passed; full frontend tests and typecheck pass.
